family_rationale: This batch exhausts the remaining assigned source-like active system_v3 surfaces after the earlier top-level, spec, conformance, a2_state live-state, and a1_state packets.

The files only cohere if kept as an outer-shell packet: residual A2 kernel doctrine, derived-index sidecars, control-plane transport/scaffold surfaces, runtime trees, spec audit residue, and tooling orchestration.

Bundling them preserves the central contradictions: A2-first governance versus automation density, canonical runtime versus preserved blocked runtime trees, transport-law narrowness versus scaffold breadth, and canonical A2 state versus derived backup/log accumulation.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve source-class boundaries, blocked-runtime status, derived-index noncanon status, and template/report scaffolding status; do not treat tooling breadth or control-plane scaffolds as stronger law than source-bound A2 doctrine or lower-loop earned state

structure_markers.label: canonical_runtime_bootpack_packet
line_spans: runtime/bootpack_b_kernel_v1/*.py:16 core files + strategy sample + sim stub
